description: Rocky/RHEL host, privileged (opted in): root login and password auth on, X11 forwarding on, no password expiry, a legacy MD5 password hash, ip_forward enabled, ptrace unrestricted, suid_dumpable on, unprivileged BPF on, telnet listening, rpcbind enabled. firewalld/auditd/rsyslog on. apt-get is absent (updates check errors). The file sshd_config lists weak ciphers/MACs, but `sshd -T` shows the effective set (crypto-policy hardened) has none, so ssh-weak-crypto passes on the effective config. Effective ClientAliveInterval is 0, so idle sessions are never disconnected.
